hero.tagline: From planning to deployment — I build and ship solo

profile.name: Gwangsoo Choi
profile.bio0: Tokyo resident ({tokyoYears} years) — Korean product builder & software engineer with {careerYears} years of development experience.
profile.bio1: From large-scale system development to fast-paced startup product building — now planning, developing, and operating a mobile app solo.
profile.bio2: I leverage AI to handle not just engineering but also planning, design, and marketing myself, aiming to build a one-person unicorn.
profile.bio3: I track signup and churn flows, monitor user behavior metrics, and detect errors in real time — driving product improvement through data-driven decisions.
profile.bio4: Guided by development principles refined through real-world experience, I handle everything from architecture to deployment on my own. In team settings, close communication comes first. By deeply integrating AI agents into code management, reviews, and design, I achieve quality and velocity that would be hard to reach alone.
profile.bioSub: Also available for mid-to-long term freelance full-stack engineering contracts.

about.subtitle: Namseoul Univ. · Japanese Language School · Military  |  한국어 · 日本語 · English

highlights.title: Core Strengths
highlights.solo_desc: Hands-on experience across the entire service lifecycle — from planning to deployment and operations — with a deep understanding of business structure. I aim for efficient workflows with fast decision-making and no gaps between disciplines.
highlights.ai_desc: I run separate AI agents for planning, marketing, design, and engineering — maximizing domain expertise in each area. Claude Code-based TDD ensures code quality, while design tools like Codex, Nanovanana, Stitch, and Figma are integrated via MCP to automate dev-design collaboration. Recently, I've been leveraging Claude Cowork to build even more specialized and granular agent pipelines for product development.
highlights.tech_desc: I bring both the robustness of large-scale SI systems and the agility of startups. With a broad tech stack spanning backend, frontend, and mobile, I design and implement the architecture best suited to each project's goals.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.ponge_desc: iOS/Android app + Admin WebApp with 6-language support, AI auto-translation, and real-time map-based social features. Solo operation from planning to marketing.
projects.hafh_desc: Monthly subscription travel service — users earn coins and book hotels and flights. Stripe integration, real-time multi-OTA API sync.

philosophy.title: Development Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: I shaped my own development principles through real startup work, then built and shipped production services solo — from zero to architecture, implementation, infra, and deployment. In team settings, I value close and open communication with teammates, approaching project goals together. Since 2025, building on clean architecture methodology, I've actively used the AI agent Claude Code in personal projects — not just for development, but also for code management, reviews, architecture, and infrastructure — achieving growth and experience that wouldn't have been possible alone. This know-how now enables me to build high-quality services in the shortest time possible.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Available for mid-to-long term freelance full-stack engineering contracts. If you'd like to discuss a project, feel free to reach out.
